help.goal.how: Get rid of all your cards and accumulate the <bold>fewest points</bold> possible.
help.round: The game is played in <bold>rounds</bold>, which are made up of <bold>turns</bold>.
help.turn: <bold>On your turn, you have two options:</bold>
help.play.2: - Value strictly higher than the one on the table  (e.g., 2 and 8 = 82)
help.play.3: - Same number of cards as on the table or one more
help.pass: <bold>Pass</bold>: you do not play a card, and it is the next player's turn
help.after: After playing: <bold>take a card from the table</bold> and discard the others if there are several.
help.endturn.how: If everyone passes except one player, the round ends. That player starts the next round.
help.empty: When a player <bold>has no cards left</bold>.
help.specialplay: Or if they start a round with <bold>all identical cards</bold> (same number or couleur).
help.endgame.how: The game ends when a player reaches <bold>15 points or more</bold>. The player with the fewest points wins.
header.play: <play>Play {count, plural, =0{cards} one{this card} other{these cards}}</play> or <pass>Pass</pass>
header.take.other: {player} must take a previously placed card
round.summary.title: Round summary: {player} wins the round!
tuto.goal: In <bold>Odin</bold>, you must discard all the cards in your hand.
tuto.round: As soon as a player manages to discard all their cards, the round ends, and you score <bold>1 point for each card remaining in your hand</bold>.
tuto.end: The game ends when a player reaches <bold>15 points or more</bold>. The player with the fewest points wins.
tuto.go:
It's your turn.
Since there are no cards on the table yet, you must play <bold>one card</bold> from your hand.
Play this card, then click “Play this card” in the header.
tuto.choice:
Your first opponent must now play one or more of their cards, or pass.
To play cards, <bold>their value must be strictly higher</bold> than the value in the center of the table.
tuto.more:
Your opponent has played this card. He has the right to do so because its value is higher than your card.
After playing, <bold>he collects one of the cards</bold> that was previously on the table.
He therefore collects your card.
tuto.opponent: Now it's your second opponent's turn.
tuto.you:
It's your turn.
You can play <bold>the same number of cards</bold> as the number of cards in the center of the table <bold>or one more card</bold>.
Here, you could play one card or two cards.
tuto.constraint: To play multiple cards, they must be <bold>of the same value or the same color</bold>.
tuto.play.2.expl:
When you play multiple cards, the value of these cards is equal to <bold>the highest number formed by adding the digits together</bold>.
The value of your combination is therefore 21.
tuto.pick: You must now take a card that was on the table. You have no choice, so you take this card.
tuto.opponent.pass:
Your opponent passes.
<bold>Note</bold>: even if you pass, you can play again on your next turn.
tuto.threecards: Your second opponent played this combination of 3 cards. Its value is 666.
tuto.more.2: It's your turn. You can play this combination, whose value is higher than the one on the table.
tuto.pick.2: Now, pick up the card of your choice.
tuto.allpass: Both of your opponents have passed! Your combination wins the round: it is discarded, and it is your turn to start a new round by playing the card of your choice.
tuto.start:
When you start the round, <bold>you can only play one card</bold>.
However, if all the cards in your hand are <bold>the same color or value, you win the round</bold>!
tuto.endtrigger:
The round ends when one player has no cards left in their hand, and each player scores <bold>1 point per card</bold> remaining in their hand.
If a player reaches <bold>15 points or more</bold>, the game ends, and the player with <bold>the fewest points</bold> wins.
Now it's your turn: may Odin be with you!
